chunks.text: Technical Reports - Jiantao Jiao. Pairwise Proximal Policy Optimization: Large Language Models Alignment via Comparative RL (EECS-2024-21). Tianhao Wu, Banghua Zhu, Ruoyu Zhang, Zhaojin Wen, Kannan Ramchandran and Jiantao Jiao.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report?
chunks.answer: Pairwise Proximal Policy Optimization: Large Language Models Alignment via Comparative RL
